content.text:
Looking at the image, the track appears as a wide green surface with the dark wall/boundary visible on the left side, suggesting the car is near the left edge and the track continues to the right — the car appears to be off-center to the right of the track centerline.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 79, target = 79 + 5 = 84
- Waypoint 84: x=7.2339, y=2.0107
- Car position: x=1.6760, y=4.8555
- Bearing = atan2(2.0107 - 4.8555, 7.2339 - 1.6760) = atan2(-2.8448, 5.5579)
- = atan2(-2.8448, 5.5579) ≈ -27.12°
- Current heading: 148.74°
- Delta = -27.12 - 148.74 = -175.86° → normalize: -175.86 + 360 = 184.14° → -175.86°

Wrap-around again. Car heading ~149° (still in right curve). All wheels NOT on track — car is going off track! Need to steer harder right to get back on track and complete the curve.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car has all_wheels_on_track=false and is 0.38m from center (track width 0.76m means nearly at edge), still in the right-hand curve with heading 148°, must steer hard right to stay on track.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long westward straight around waypoints 70-76, heading ~160-170°",
    "After waypoint ~76, track curves sharply south then southeast — sustained right steering needed",
    "Lookahead waypoints beyond the curve give misleading large positive deltas due to heading wrap-around at ~180°",
    "When navigating the right-hand curve after waypoint 76, use -25 steering at speed 0.75 to avoid going off track",
    "Car heading decreasing: 169→152→148 — right turn working but car going off track at step 116",
    "all_wheels_on_track=false at step 116 with distance_from_center=0.38 (track_width=0.76) — very close to edge",
    "Must use maximum right steering (-25) at low speed (0.75) to recover and complete the curve",
    "Car is right of center (is_left_of_center=false) — drifting to outside of right-hand curve",
    "Reduce speed to 0.75 and increase steering to -25 when off-track in this curve section",
    "Visual shows dark wall on left — car near left/outer boundary of the southward curve"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.888, 1.831, 1.775, 1.725, 1.676],
    "y": [4.682, 4.715, 4.759, 4.806, 4.855],
    "yaw": [164.196, 161.295, 156.583, 152.308, 148.741]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -175.86,
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
